/usr/bin/clang++ -g -arch arm64 -isysroot /Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX15.2.sdk -mmacosx-version-min=14.5 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/game.dir/game_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/game.dir/gui/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/game.dir/gui/StartScreen.cpp.o CMakeFiles/game.dir/gui/GameScreen.cpp.o CMakeFiles/game.dir/gui/Character.cpp.o CMakeFiles/game.dir/gui/Projectile.cpp.o CMakeFiles/game.dir/gui/game.cpp.o CMakeFiles/game.dir/game_autogen/GBFAFXFCVO/qrc_resources.cpp.o -o game -F/Users/hanyahashem/Qt1/6.11.1/macos/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/Users/hanyahashem/Qt1/6.11.1/macos/lib /Users/hanyahashem/Qt1/6.11.1/macos/lib/QtWidgets.framework/Versions/A/QtWidgets /Users/hanyahashem/Qt1/6.11.1/macos/lib/QtGui.framework/Versions/A/QtGui -framework AppKit -framework OpenGL -framework ImageIO -framework Metal /Users/hanyahashem/Qt1/6.11.1/macos/lib/QtCore.framework/Versions/A/QtCore -framework IOKit -framework DiskArbitration -framework UniformTypeIdentifiers
